basic_details.job_title: ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Central Rice Research Institute (ICAR CRRI) Young Professional I Notification 2026 has been released on 15-05-2026 on the official website crri.res.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 and 45 years who have B.Sc. in Agriculture, Biotechnology, Botany, or Environmental Science are eligible to apply for this Young Professional I vacancy. The walk-in interview for ICAR CRRI Young Professional I Recruitment 2026 is scheduled on 20-05-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and at

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates is applicable as per Government of India norms.

qualification.details: Young Professional-I (YP-I): B.Sc. in Agriculture / Biotechnology / Botany / Environmental Science. Desirable: Experience in soil, plant and water analysis work in lab and field experimentation and preparation of scientific / technical reports papers.

selection_process: Written-cum-Personal Interview Screening Test (if large number of candidates)

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the ICAR CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post at ICAR-Central Rice Research Institute is scheduled for 20th May 2026. Candidates should report on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Sc. degree in Agriculture, Biotechnology, Botany, or Environmental Science to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position?
faq.answer: The age limit for candidates applying for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post is between 21 years and 45 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the ICAR CRRI Young Professional-I (YP-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Eligible candidates need to attend the walk-in interview on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post in the official notification for General/OBC categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the duration of the contract for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: The project duration for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post is up to 31st August 2026.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original and self-attested photocopies of their ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ICAR-Central Rice Research Institute located?
faq.answer: ICAR-Central Rice Research Institute is located in Cuttack, Odisha.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Young Professional-I (YP-I) post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written-cum-Personal Interview. A screening test may be conducted if there is a large number of applicants.
